title: stachys megalodonta subsp. mardinensis
intro: Stachys megalodonta subsp. mardinensis, also known as Mardin betony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Mardin betony include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in capsule or tincture form.
